mapper.select: select id, tag_name, sum(one) as counts from ( select tag.id, tag.tag_name, case when aat.application_id is null then 0 else 1 end as one from app_application_tag aat full outer join app_tag tag on aat.tag_id = tag.id where tag.id is not null and tag.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (aat.deleted = 0 or aat.deleted is null) and (tag.deleted = 0 or tag.deleted is null) ) as subquery where id is not null group by id, tag_name order by counts desc
